content:
Every couple has 5 phases of a relationship.
Each phase can last a different length.
A psychiatrist decides what phase each relationship is in.
Couples can often not tell what phase they’re in.

The five stages mirror the rivers in Hell.

The couple meets via a dating app. This app forces people to be together if they match.

5 different construction workers, from different trades, interact on a job site over the course of a house’s construction and completion. They each go through the cycle, but in a round (music). The land houses the history of the past (all events, all of time, collapse into a place). [the shining]
context: From document: Every couple has 5 phases of a relationship.
